allow: Bash(python .claude/skills/gerar-imagem/scripts/generate_image.py --prompt "Digital painting in soft fantasy style: a small glowing lantern resting on a hilltop at dusk, casting warm golden light across a vast layered landscape of distant villages connected by winding luminous pathways, suggesting connection across distance and a solo traveler illuminating a wide world. Warm amber, emerald, and deep indigo palette. Painterly, cinematic, atmospheric, soft brushwork. No text, no letters, no words." --output "godot-para-um-rpg-2d-online-estilo-pokemon/cover.png" --size 1536x1024)
